</parameter>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The centers didn't swap! The right agent still has W center (id=7) and the left agent still has c center (id=10). The animation_changed_bbox is [63, 33, 63, 33], which is at the bottom of the screen. This is the timer bar.
Wait, so clicking the right agent didn't swap the centers. But earlier, when I clicked the agents, the centers DID swap. Let me think about when centers swap.
Looking back at my history:
1. Initial state: left agent has W center, right agent has c center
2. I clicked the right agent (at rows 30-32, cols 30-32): centers swapped, right agent got W, left agent got c
3. I moved the right agent LEFT to cols 21-23
4. I clicked the left agent (at rows 33-35, cols 15-17): centers swapped, left agent got W, right agent got c
5. I moved the left agent LEFT into the c-frame
6. I clicked the right agent (at rows 33-35, cols 21-23): centers swapped, right agent got W, left agent got c
7. I moved the right agent UP to rows 27-29
8. I clicked the right agent (at rows 27-29, cols 21-23): centers DID NOT swap!
So the centers swapped in steps 2, 4, and 6, but not in step 8. What's different about step 8?
In steps 2, 4, and 6, I clicked on an agent that was NOT inside a c-frame. In step 8, I clicked on the right agent, which is also NOT inside a c-frame. So that's not the difference.
Wait, let me reconsider. In step 2, I clicked the right agent at its original position (cols 30-32). In step 6, I clicked the right agent at cols 21-23. In step 8, I clicked the right agent at cols 21-23.
Hmm, maybe the issue is that in step 8, the right agent is already active (I clicked it in step 6, and it's still active). So clicking it again doesn't swap centers because it's already active.
But in step 6, I clicked the left agent first (which was inside the c-frame), and then the right agent. Wait, no. Let me re-trace:
Step 4: I clicked the left agent at rows 33-35, cols 15-17. This swapped centers: left agent got W, right agent got c.
Step 5: I moved the left agent LEFT into the c-frame.
Step 6: I clicked the right agent at rows 33-35, cols 21-23. This swapped centers: right agent got W, left agent got c.
Wait, but in step 6, the left agent was inside the c-frame. So clicking the right agent swapped centers with the left agent (which is inside the c-frame).
In step 8, I clicked the right agent again. But the right agent is already active (from step 6). So clicking it again doesn't do anything.
Hmm, but the animation_changed_bbox is [63, 33, 63, 33], which is the timer bar. So something did change, but it's just the timer.
OK so the issue is: the right agent is already active. Clicking it again doesn't swap centers. To swap centers, I need to click the OTHER agent (the left agent, which is inside the c-frame).
Let me try clicking the left agent to swap centers.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Right agent is already active. Need to click the left agent to swap centers.
# Left agent is inside left c-frame at rows 33-35, cols 12-14
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 34, 'col': 13}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
